basic_details.job_title: BRO GREF Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 899 Electrician, Draughtsman and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Border Roads Organisation (BRO) has released a new recruitment notification in the 18–24 April 2026 Employment Newspaper for 899 vacancies across various posts, including Electrician, Draughtsman, Store Keeper Technical, and others. This recruitment under Advt. No. 01/2026 offers a valuable opportunity for candidates seeking central government jobs in the defence and infrastructure sectors.

important_dates.raw: Notification Date: 18-24 April 2026 Employment News Starting Date for Apply Online: Available Soon Last Date for Apply Online: Available Soon

age_limit.details: Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.details: Candidates are advised to thoroughly review the detailed eligibility conditions, educational qualifications, and trade-wise requirements on the official BRO website before submitting their applications. | The official notification emphasizes that applicants must verify their eligibility prior to applying. The post-wise eligibility criteria and qualification details will be updated here soon after the release of the detailed BRO notification.

selection_process: Written Exam Skill Test (as per post requirement) Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Visit the official Border Roads Organisation website at bro.gov.in and go to the recruitment/advertisement section.
Find and open the BRO Electrician, Draughtsman and More Recruitment 2026 (Advt. No. 01/2026) notification and read it carefully, including eligibility, instructions and important dates.
Click on the Apply Online link (or registration link) given for this recruitment and complete the registration with valid mobile number and email ID.
Log in using the generated credentials and fill in the online application form with personal, educational and other required details as per your certificates.
Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature and relevant documents/certificates in the prescribed format and size.
Pay the application fee of Rs. 50/- (for General/OBC/EWS) through the available online payment modes, if applicable.
Recheck all the details filled in the form, submit the application, and take a printout/soft copy of the final submitted form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies released under BRO Electrician, Draughtsman and More Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 899 vacancies have been announced for Draughtsman, Hindi Typist, Store Keeper Technical, Operator Communication, Operator Excavating Machinery and Electrician posts under Advt. No. 01/2026.

faq.question: Q2. How can I apply for BRO Electrician, Draughtsman and Other Posts Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates will be able to apply online through the official BRO website bro.gov.in by filling the application form, uploading documents and paying the applicable fee within the notified dates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for BRO Electrician, Draughtsman and More Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the brief notice, the application fee for General/OBC/EWS candidates is Rs. 50/-, while details for other categories will be confirmed in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for BRO Electrician, Draughtsman and Other posts?
faq.answer: The selection process is expected to include a Written Exam, Skill/Trade Test (as per post), followed by Document Verification and Medical Examination, as per the standard BRO recruitment pattern.

faq.question: Q5. Where can I check the detailed eligibility criteria and post-wise qualifications for BRO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates should refer to the detailed notification and recruitment section available on the official BRO website bro.gov.in; post-wise eligibility and qualification details will be updated there and on this page after release.
